---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for FreeRAG or MyRAG
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow are you trying to improve?

## Proposed Behavior

What should FreeRAG or MyRAG do?

## Product Boundary

Does this belong in:

- FreeRAG app: local raw material collection
- MyRAG skill: LLM-side reading, mining, and summarization
- Documentation / release packaging

## Privacy Impact

Does the feature read, store, upload, or transform private user material?
